summary: Clean green run: plan -> implement (2 rounds) -> review (1, APPROVE) -> test (1, ALL GREEN) -> report. v0.6.5 shipped separateConvergentJogs (#1) + computePerimeterPorts far-node deskewer (#2), mirrored byte-for-byte in the vnmRuntime twin; defect #3 deferred. 413 tests green; zero snapshot/example/hero churn; visual bar met on architecture.mmd PNGs (light+dark).
